title: Bee Removal in Belmont, Bronx | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Belmont, Bronx. Safe, humane extraction by licensed experts. Serving Arthur Avenue & surrounding areas. Call for fast response!
intro: Belmont, known as the Bronx's Little Italy, faces unique bee challenges due to its mix of historic rowhouses, bustling restaurants along Arthur Avenue, and residential gardens. Our professional bee removal services protect Belmont families and businesses from unwanted hives while ensuring safe, humane relocation. We provide fast, reliable bee removal throughout the neighborhood, from East 187th Street to Fordham Road.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in Belmont's diverse building types, from pre-war apartments to commercial storefronts along Arthur Avenue. Our licensed technicians understand the neighborhood's architecture and provide same-day emergency service to keep your property safe and bee-free.
localContext: Belmont's vibrant outdoor dining culture and proximity to the Bronx Zoo make bee activity particularly common during spring and summer months. The neighborhood's many gardens, including those near Our Lady of Mount Carmel Church, and the outdoor markets along Arthur Avenue create attractive environments for bee colonies seeking nesting sites.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Belmont?
faqs.answer: Bee removal in Belmont typically ranges from $350 to $550, depending on hive location, size, and accessibility. Ground-level hives in accessible areas cost less, while removals from upper floors of Belmont's multi-story buildings or hard-to-reach areas may be priced at the higher end. We provide free estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive in Belmont?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency bee removal services throughout Belmont, including the Arthur Avenue area and surrounding residential streets. Most bee removals are completed within 1-2 hours. We understand the urgency, especially for restaurants and businesses in this busy neighborhood, and prioritize rapid response times.

faqs.question: Is bee removal safe for my family and the Arthur Avenue restaurant district?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use safe, eco-friendly methods that protect your family, customers, and pets while effectively removing bee colonies. Our licensed technicians follow strict safety protocols suitable for Belmont's dense residential and commercial areas. We prioritize humane relocation whenever possible to preserve these important pollinators.

faqs.question: What types of properties in Belmont do you service for bee removal?
faqs.answer: We service all property types in Belmont, including historic rowhouses, apartment buildings, restaurants and cafes along Arthur Avenue, retail shops, the outdoor markets, and commercial spaces near Fordham University. Our team has experience with both residential and commercial bee removal, including challenging locations like rooftops, wall voids, and outdoor seating areas.
